projects.name: crest4
projects.description: Assigns taxonomic names to DNA sequences from environmental sequencing — a modern rewrite of the CREST classifier.

projects.name: pacmill
projects.description: End-to-end pipeline for long-read PacBio 16S rRNA amplicon sequencing, from raw reads to publication-ready reports.

projects.name: seqenv
projects.description: Links DNA sequences to Environment Ontology (EnvO) terms by text-mining the scientific literature.

projects.name: track
projects.description: Straightforward read/write access to genomic tracks across many file formats, backed by SQLite.

projects.name: forest_puller
projects.description: Retrieves and harmonizes European forest-inventory data from public sources into one comparable dataset.

projects.name: sinclair.bio
projects.description: This very site — a fast, bilingual static site built with Astro, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript, auto-deployed on every commit.

testimonials.quote: I can wholeheartedly recommend Lucas for scientific website development and online data handling. For our project on tracking the microbiomes of industrial anaerobic digesters, Lucas provided immensely helpful advice on how to best construct an online repository for our data, and also developed a highly professional and stylistic front page. We have also benefited from his experience in choosing the right title for the site. The service was professional and on schedule, and Lucas was great to work with.
testimonials.author: Orkun Soyer

testimonials.quote: The metagenomics microbial 16S rRNA pipeline developed by Lucas has been crucial for our gut microbiome projects.
testimonials.author: Richard Svanbäck

testimonials.quote: Lucas helped me in 2021, through his company Sinclair Bio, with a total reimplementation of the bioinformatics software CREST that I originally developed during my PhD. It was a pure pleasure to work with Lucas and in addition to writing well structured and state of the art python code, the help and advice he provided, planning the work and resolving different issues, was always very friendly, insightful, skillfull, clear and in prompt. I can warmly recommend Lucas and Sinclair Bio for software development or data analysis tasks related to bioinformatics or to other ends!
testimonials.author: Anders Lanzén
testimonials.role: Sr. Investigator at AZTI and Ikerbasque Research Fellow

testimonials.quote: Lucas was a passionate and motivated Python teacher who was able to pass on not only his knowledge but also his experience to students. His lessons were clear, informative and well organised, allowing students to progress step by step. Feedback from students was very positive. I hope he will return every year to teach this course again.
testimonials.author: Jenna Lüthi
testimonials.role: Head of Web Development — SAE Institute Genève

testimonials.quote: Lucas was able to spearhead our bioinformatics analysis pipeline project and bring it to completion in an efficient and timely manner. Working with him was a pleasure and I strongly recommend him.
testimonials.author: Guansheng Du, Ph.D.

classes.title: UX and UI Design with Figma
Introduction to the Biology of Cancer
